items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding external directory links to internal users/subjects. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the existence or correctness of these links. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes, but none provide the necessary evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
